summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 13 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 59 — we need to reverse this today. 19 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 13 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,125 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 10 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 30 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Jeff:** Carrying 11 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

136 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **71 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 38 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$36,572 in payments going out this week** across 17 tasks — make sure funds are available. $2,274 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Kyle Aubry - Project 01 and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 13 overdue (oldest: 27d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 8 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 11. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 9 overdue (oldest: 30d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
